system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tiendo_thanhpham_by_order","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_TIENDO_THANHPHAM_BY_ORDER(@ORDERNUMBER NVARCHAR(MAX))
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.order_number, A.item_number, 
		CONVERT(FLOAT, SUM(A.order_qty)) AS order_qty,
		SUM(A.order_qty * B.m3_tc) AS order_m3TC
	INTO #DONHANG
	FROM tr_order_detail A
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
	WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' 
		AND A.order_number IN (SELECT dbo.TRIM([value]) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@ORDERNUMBER, ','))
	GROUP BY A.order_number, A.item_number

	SELECT A.madonhang, A.masp1, 
		SCT01 = SUM(CASE WHEN A.c_op = 'SCT01' THEN A.soluong END),
		SON01 = SUM(CASE WHEN A.c_op = 'SON01' THEN A.soluong END),
		DG01 = SUM(CASE WHEN A.c_op = 'DG01' THEN A.soluong END),
		DG02 = SUM(CASE WHEN A.c_op = 'DG02' THEN A.soluong END)
	INTO #THONGKE
	FROM (
		SELECT A.madonhang, C.c_op, A.masp1,
			soluong = CASE WHEN A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong * A.sokhoi ELSE A.sokhoi END
		FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
			INNER JOIN trtb_m_location B ON A.congdoan = B.c_location
			INNER JOIN trtb_m_op C ON B.c_op = C.c_op
		WHERE C.department IN ('SON', 'DONGGOI') -- AND A.mact = '000'
			AND A.donhang_sanxuat IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@ORDERNUMBER, ','))
			AND A.congdoan LIKE '%-PROD'
	) A
	GROUP BY A.madonhang, A.masp1

	SELECT A.order_number, A.item_number, C.tensp, C.hehang, 
		A.order_qty, 
		A.order_m3TC,
		B.SCT01, B.SON01, B.DG01, B.DG02,
		SCT01_PER = FORMAT(IIF(A.order_m3TC = 0, 0, B.SCT01 / A.order_m3TC), 'P2'),
		SON01_PER = FORMAT(IIF(A.order_m3TC = 0, 0, B.SON01 / A.order_m3TC), 'P2'),
		DG01_PER = FORMAT(IIF(A.order_m3TC = 0, 0,B.DG01 / A.order_m3TC), 'P2'),
		DG02_PER = FORMAT(IIF(A.order_m3TC = 0, 0,B.DG02 / A.order_m3TC), 'P2')
	FROM #DONHANG A
		LEFT JOIN #THONGKE B ON A.order_number = B.madonhang AND A.item_number = B.masp1
		LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham C ON A.item_number = C.masp

	DROP TABLE #DONHANG, #THONGKE

END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat","dbo.trtb_m_location","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
